title: responseGetMatchedOffersList
description: Response with the list of offers available on the Marketplace.

items.description: Array of SKUs in the offer.

LastModified.description: Last date the offer was modified.

ProductId.description: A string that identifies the seller's product. This is the ID that the marketplace will use for all references to this product.

CategoryId.description: Offer's Category ID that the product belongs to, configured in the Catalog. It should be the marketplace's category chosen for the offer to be matched with.

BrandId.description: Offer's brand ID that the product belongs to, configured in the Catalog. It should be the marketplace's brand chosen for the offer to be matched with.
